task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI, verify that a channel named 'ICU_Admission_Notifier' exists in the Channels list or is currently being edited.

task_completion.description: Configure the source as a TCP Listener on port 6661 in MLLP mode
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Source tab of the channel, verify the Connector Type is 'TCP Listener', the Port is '6661', and the Transmission Mode is 'MLLP'.

task_completion.description: Configure a filter for PV1-3.1 containing 'ICU'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Filter tab, verify there is a rule configured to check the HL7 field PV1-3.1 (often represented as msg['PV1']['PV1.3']['PV1.3.1'] or similar) for the value 'ICU'.

task_completion.description: Create an SMTP Sender destination named 'Email_Alert'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Destinations tab, verify there is a destination named 'Email_Alert' with the Connector Type set to 'SMTP Sender'.

task_completion.description: Configure SMTP server, To, and From addresses
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SMTP Sender destination settings, verify the SMTP Server is 'mailhog', Port is '1025', To is 'icu-admin@hospital.org', and From is 'alerts@hospital.org'.

task_completion.description: Configure email subject and body with PID-5
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SMTP Sender destination settings, verify the Subject field contains 'ICU Admission Alert' and the Body field contains a reference to the PID-5 field (e.g., ${msg['PID']['PID.5']...}).
In the Dashboard view of NextGen Connect, verify the 'ICU_Admission_Notifier' channel is listed and its status is 'Deployed' or 'Started'.

integrity.description: Agent used the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent interacted with the NextGen Connect Administrator Java application GUI to configure the channel, rather than using a script.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass GUI by editing XML files directly
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent did not simply write or edit an XML file in a text editor or terminal to bypass the GUI configuration.

integrity.description: Deployment is shown in the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the deployment status is shown in the actual NextGen Connect Dashboard, not just a text output or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The channel must be named 'ICU_Admission_Notifier'. Source must be TCP Listener on port 6661 with MLLP mode. Filter must check PV1-3.1 for 'ICU'. Destination must be SMTP Sender named 'Email_Alert' using host 'mailhog', port 1025, from 'alerts@hospital.org', to 'icu-admin@hospital.org'. Subject must include 'ICU Admission Alert' and body must include PID-5.
